about.title: About Flycockpit
about.body: Flycockpit is the authenticated control plane for hosted and enterprise remote development instances.

home.title: Flycockpit operations console
home.subtitle: Access remote instances, browser terminals, file tools, device authorization, and enterprise controls from one authenticated cockpit.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie policy
cookiePolicy.body: Flycockpit stores strictly necessary cookies for authentication, security, language, theme, and consent preferences. Optional categories can be changed at any time.
